name: @hyva-themes/magento2-default-theme
description: Hyvä-Themes Default Theme, a TailwindCSS and Alpine.js based Magento frontend theme that makes eCommerce happy.

scripts.watch: npm run generate && npx tailwindcss -i tailwind-source.css -o ../css/styles.css --watch
scripts.build: npm run generate && npx tailwindcss -i tailwind-source.css -o ../css/styles.css --minify

author: Hyvä Themes BV
